**Checklist**

- [ ] I searched existing [Issues](https://github.com/hwdsl2/headscale-install/issues?q=is%3Aissue), and did not find a similar enhancement request
- [ ] I read the [README](https://github.com/hwdsl2/headscale-install/blob/main/README.md) or the relevant section
- [ ] This request is about the Headscale install script/config

**Describe the enhancement request**
A clear and concise description of your enhancement request.

**Problem or use case**
What problem would this solve, or what workflow would it improve?

**Area**
- [ ] Install or uninstall flow
- [ ] Script options or interactive menu
- [ ] Systemd service or configuration
- [ ] Headscale users/nodes/pre-auth keys or Tailscale client setup
- [ ] Documentation

**Current workaround**
Describe any workaround you are using today, if applicable.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the enhancement request here.
